# Madhav Bondhare | Full Stack Development

Welcome to my portfolio website.

I'm Madhav Bondhare, a Full-Stack Developer and final-year BCA student passionate about building modern web applications and continuously improving my development skills through real-world projects.

This website serves as a central place to explore my projects, technical experience, skills, and ways to connect with me.

## Navigation

* [Home](https://madhavbondhare.vercel.app/)
* [Projects](https://madhavbondhare.vercel.app/projects)
* [Experience](https://madhavbondhare.vercel.app/experience)
* [Contact](https://madhavbondhare.vercel.app/contact)

## About Me

I enjoy turning ideas into functional and user-friendly applications. Most of my work focuses on full-stack web development using JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL.

I like building projects that solve real problems, help me learn new technologies, and improve my understanding of software development.

## Projects

### Growth Tracker

A goal and productivity tracking application that helps users manage daily, monthly, and yearly goals while monitoring progress through visual reports and analytics.

Project:

* https://growthtracker.vercel.app/

### IntelliStudy

An AI-powered study planner that helps students organize their learning schedule based on syllabus requirements and exam timelines.

Project:

* https://intellistudy-app.vercel.app/

## Experience

Details about my internship experience, technical work, and development journey can be found here:

* https://madhavbondhare.vercel.app/experience

## Contact

If you'd like to discuss opportunities, projects, internships, collaborations, or simply connect, feel free to reach out through the contact page.

The contact form on this website is powered by EmailJS.
